deep_dive.title: FORCE: Efficient VLA Reinforcement Fine-Tuning via Value-Calibrated Warm-up and Self-Distillation
deep_dive.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are often constrained by the imitation ceiling imposed by sub-optimal data. While Reinforcement Learning (RL) fine-tuning can surpass this limit, it is notoriously sample inefficient. This challenge arises from two core issues: (1) catastrophic initial unlearning due to an unstable Q-function and (2) inefficient policy updates caused by low-quality exploration data, often forcing a reliance on costly human interventions. We introduce FORCE, a 3-stage framework that stabilizes fine-tuning by tackling both issues. FORCE first incorporates a Value-Calibrated Warm-Up phase, utilizing on-policy rollouts to mitigate the distributional shift of the Q-function. Subsequently, during the online stage, this calibrated Q-function acts as a filter for both the policy's own action proposals and expert data, ensuring only high-value actions are used for the policy update. We evaluate FORCE on various simulation and real-world tasks, and the result shows that FORCE achieves a 79% absolute improvement in success rates and outperform prior RL methods by 10%, while accelerating training by 32.5%. Critically, it mitigates the common success rate drop and achieves this robust performance without human intervention, marking a significant step towards deploying capable and autonomous robotic agents.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: uses self-distillation in RL fine-tuning for VLA models, addresses policy distillation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 在VLA模型强化微调中使用自蒸馏，涉及策略蒸馏方法
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 在VLA模型强化微调中使用自蒸馏，涉及策略蒸馏方法
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 在VLA模型强化微调中使用自蒸馏，涉及策略蒸馏方法
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: FORCE uses value-calibrated warm-up and self-distillation to stabilize RL fine-tuning of VLA models, improving sample efficiency.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对VLA模型在强化微调中样本效率低的问题，提出FORCE框架：通过值校准预热缓解Q函数分布偏移，并引入自蒸馏阶段利用在线采样数据提升策略更新质量。在机器人操作任务上，FORCE显著减少训练步数并超越模仿学习上限，为VLA模型后训练提供了高效蒸馏方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文针对VLA模型在强化微调中样本效率低的问题，提出FORCE框架：通过值校准预热缓解Q函数分布偏移，并引入自蒸馏阶段利用在线采样数据提升策略更新质量。在机器人操作任务上，FORCE显著减少训练步数并超越模仿学习上限，为VLA模型后训练提供了高效蒸馏方案。

quick_skim.title: Reinforcement learning to improve large language model-based automated code compliance systems
quick_skim.abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based approaches for automated code compliance (ACC) of building regulations are prone to generating incorrect and hallucinated computer-processable rules. This paper introduces P4IR, a two-stage framework that uses supervised fine-tuning (SFT) to instill domain knowledge in an LLM, followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to improve the accuracy of the generated intermediate representations in the form of high-level code skeletons. The framework achieved reductions of up to 23.8% and 38.6% in tree edit distance and token-level Levenshtein distance respectively, relative to the SFT baselines. Comparative analysis demonstrates that this approach in a zero-shot setting outperforms leading LLMs in both code structure and semantics, specifically Claude Opus and Sonnet 4.5, GPT-5.2, Qwen-3-Max, and GLM-4.7, evaluated via few-shot prompting. Additionally, the GRPO stage produced a small yet statistically significant reduction in false positives. By combining SFT with GRPO to optimize directly for domain-specific objectives, this approach offers a path toward more accurate and reliable LLM-based ACC systems.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: uses GRPO (RLHF) to improve LLM code generation, relevant to RLHF and distillation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用GRPO（RLHF）改进LLM代码生成，与RLHF和蒸馏相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用GRPO（RLHF）改进LLM代码生成，与RLHF和蒸馏相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用GRPO（RLHF）改进LLM代码生成，与RLHF和蒸馏相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: P4IR applies SFT then GRPO to improve LLM-based code compliance, reducing errors up to 38.6%.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对LLM生成建筑规范代码时的幻觉问题，提出P4IR框架：先通过监督微调注入领域知识，再使用组相对策略优化（GRPO）提高中间表示准确率。在零样本设置下超越现有LLM，树编辑距离降低23.8%，Levenshtein距离降低38.6%，展示了RLHF在代码合规中的有效性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对LLM生成建筑规范代码时的幻觉问题，提出P4IR框架：先通过监督微调注入领域知识，再使用组相对策略优化（GRPO）提高中间表示准确率。在零样本设置下超越现有LLM，树编辑距离降低23.8%，Levenshtein距离降低38.6%，展示了RLHF在代码合规中的有效性。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: reinforcement learning from human feedback and distillation

quick_skim.title: Neglected Free Lunch from Post-training: Progress Advantage for LLM Agents
quick_skim.abstract: Process reward models enable fine-grained, step-level evaluation of LLMs, yet building them for agentic settings remains prohibitively difficult: long-horizon interactions, irreversible actions, and stochastic environment feedback make both human annotation and Monte Carlo estimation infeasible at scale. In this work, we show that reinforcement learning (RL) post-training already provides the ingredients for effective step-level scoring, eliminating the need for dedicated reward model training altogether. Concretely, we derive an implicit advantage under a general stochastic Markov decision process, which we term progress advantage -- log-probability ratio between the RL-trained policy and its reference policy exactly recovers the optimal advantage function. This formulation makes the resulting signal annotation-free, domain-agnostic, and available as a byproduct of the standard RL post-training pipeline. We validate the effectiveness of the progress advantage across three different applications: test-time scaling, uncertainty quantification, and failure attribution on five benchmarks and four model families. Across all settings, it consistently outperforms confidence-based baselines and, despite requiring no task-specific training, surpasses dedicated trained reward models. We complement these results with deeper analyses on characteristics of progress advantage, offering practical guidance for adoption in real-world agentic systems.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: derives implicit advantage from RL policy and reference policy ratio, related to distillation concepts
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 从RL策略与参考策略的比值推导隐式优势，与蒸馏概念相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 从RL策略与参考策略的比值推导隐式优势，与蒸馏概念相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 从RL策略与参考策略的比值推导隐式优势，与蒸馏概念相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Shows that log-probability ratio between RL-trained policy and reference policy recovers optimal advantage, enabling step-level scoring without reward models.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文发现强化学习后训练中，训练后策略与参考策略的对数概率比恰好恢复最优优势函数，从而无需额外奖励模型即可获得步骤级评分。该进展优势为LLM智能体提供了一种免费的过程奖励信号，显著简化了过程监督的标注成本，是后训练强化学习的重要理论发现。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文发现强化学习后训练中，训练后策略与参考策略的对数概率比恰好恢复最优优势函数，从而无需额外奖励模型即可获得步骤级评分。该进展优势为LLM智能体提供了一种免费的过程奖励信号，显著简化了过程监督的标注成本，是后训练强化学习的重要理论发现。
